name: Kentucky Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Season and cook the chicken until done.
2. Dry the chicken pieces thoroughly.
3. Mix the sifted flour, salt, pepper, and baking powder together in a bowl.
4. In another bowl, beat the egg and add milk to create a batter.
5. Combine the liquid mixture with the dry ingredients until just combined.
6. Dip each piece of chicken into the batter.
7. Fry the chicken pieces until they are browned on all sides.
